jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Resonance
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
